headerDisplay: Event-driven Homebridge plugin for Alarm.com-backed security systems (ADT Control, ADT Command, ADT+, Brinks, and others). Requires Python 3.13+ on your Homebridge host; the plugin auto-installs `pyalarmdotcomajax` in a private venv on first run.
footerDisplay: If your account has 2FA enabled, run `python -m pyalarmdotcomajax` once in the plugin's venv to capture a remember-me cookie, then paste it into the 2FA field in Advanced settings.

username.title: Email
username.description: Your Alarm.com (or ADT Control / ADT+) login email.

exposeSecurityPanel.title: Expose Security Panel
exposeSecurityPanel.description: Exposes the alarm panel as a HomeKit Security System accessory.

armAwayKeypadBypass.title: Bypass open zones when arming
armAwayKeypadBypass.description: When Home.app requests Arm, faulted zones will be bypassed. Leave off for most setups.

mfaCookie.title: 2FA Remember-Me Cookie
mfaCookie.description: Only needed if your account has 2FA enabled. See footer for how to capture.

pythonPath.title: Python executable path
pythonPath.description: Override the detected Python 3.13+ binary. Leave blank for auto-detect.

items.description: Sign in with the same credentials you use for the Alarm.com (or ADT Control / ADT+) app.
These settings are not required for most users.
